title: Hospital service districts; Jefferson Parish; exception
doc_html:
§4341.2.  Hospital service districts; Jefferson Parish; exception

The sale or lease of any hospital owned by a hospital service district in Jefferson Parish shall be in accordance with the provisions of R.S. 46:1064.2.

Acts 2001, No. 379, §1.
